vetonit-premium-fix.name: PREMIUM FIX
vetonit-premium-fix.description: Premium cementitious tile adhesive composed of hydraulic binders, selected aggregates and special additives. For ceramic and terrazzo tiles. Applied at 3-10 mm thickness.
application_areas: Interior and exterior floors and walls

vetonit-tile-fix-universal.name: TILE FIX UNIVERSAL
vetonit-tile-fix-universal.description: Universal cementitious tile adhesive. Composed of hydraulic binders, selected aggregates and special additives. For bonding ceramic tiles on walls and floors.

vetonit-tile-fix-universal-c2te.name: TILE FIX UNIVERSAL C2TE
vetonit-tile-fix-universal-c2te.description: Upgraded C2TE cementitious tile adhesive with improved adhesion, slip resistance and extended open time. For larger-format and lower-absorption tiles.

vetonit-porcelain-tile-fix.name: PORCELAIN TILE FIX (PORCELAIN PLUS GREEN)
vetonit-porcelain-tile-fix.description: Deformable cementitious adhesive with improved characteristics, slip resistance and extended open time. Specially for porcelain and large non-absorbent tiles. Applied at 3-10 mm.

vetonit-ultra.name: VETONIT ULTRA
vetonit-ultra.description: High-performance cementitious mortar adhesive for fixing tiles, terrazzo tiles, marble, and Riyadh stones. Applied at 3-10 mm thickness.

vetonit-vetoset-ca545.name: VETOSET CA545 (A+B)
vetonit-vetoset-ca545.description: Two-component polymer-modified cementitious tile adhesive. Enhanced adhesion and flexibility for demanding tile installations. Ideal for pools, fountains, and water tanks.
vetonit-vetoset-ca545.classification: C2 E S1 two-component cementitious adhesive
pack_size: Two-component kit (20 kg powder + 5 kg liquid polymer)

vetonit-vetoset-ea454.name: VETOSET EA454
vetonit-vetoset-ea454.description: Three-component R2 reaction-resin epoxy tile adhesive. Chemically-resistant, high-strength bonding for demanding installations.

vetonit-vetoset-ua456.name: VETOSET UA456
vetonit-vetoset-ua456.description: Two-component polyurethane-based binder for sandwich panels and flexible bonding. For demanding tile and panel installations.

vetonit-vetofix-vinyl.name: VETOFIX VINYL
vetonit-vetofix-vinyl.description: One-component acrylic vinyl floor adhesive with extended open time. For vinyl, linoleum, and textile floor coverings.
application_areas: Vinyl floor coverings (PVC sheet and tile)

vetonit-vetofix-parquet.name: VETOFIX PARQUET
vetonit-vetofix-parquet.description: One-component solvent-free elastic polyurethane wood flooring adhesive. For engineered wood, parquet, and multi-layer wood flooring. Underfloor-heating compatible.

vetonit-vetorep-cr520.name: VETOREP CR520 (formerly VETOMORTAR CHR)
vetonit-vetorep-cr520.description: High-strength structural repair mortar for concrete substrates. R4-class cementitious mortar for load-bearing repairs.
vetonit-vetorep-cr520.classification: EN 1504-3 Class R4 structural repair mortar

vetonit-vetorep-cr521.name: VETOREP CR521
vetonit-vetorep-cr521.description: High-strength structural non-shrink self-compacting micro-concrete for deep repairs. Used with formwork for columns, beams, and voids.

vetonit-vetorep-cr523.name: VETOREP CR523
vetonit-vetorep-cr523.description: R1/R2 single-component cementitious fairing coat for smoothing concrete surfaces and filling surface imperfections.

vetonit-vetorep-er350.name: VETOREP ER350
vetonit-vetorep-er350.description: Two-component epoxy-based thixotropic solvent-free putty. For repair of surface imperfections, blowhole filling, anchoring, and leveling. Smooth-buttery paste, non-slump, can be feather-edged and built up to 3 mm in single layer.
vetonit-vetorep-er350.cure_time: 24 hours foot traffic, 7 days full strength

vetonit-vetonet-pls-221.name: VETONET PLS 221
vetonit-vetonet-pls-221.description: Premix plaster for general concrete and masonry finishing. For internal application on block walls and rough surfaces.

vetonit-vetonet-pls-222.name: VETONET PLS 222
vetonit-vetonet-pls-222.description: Upgraded premix plaster for smoother finish and exterior application. Polymer-modified for improved adhesion.
vetonit-vetonet-pls-222.classification: GP CSIII W2 polymer-modified cementitious plaster (EN 998-1)

vetonit-vetogrout-cg510.name: VETOGROUT CG510
vetonit-vetogrout-cg510.description: Non-metallic cementitious precision grout. For accurate anchoring, base plate grouting, and machinery bedding.

vetonit-vetogrout-cg519.name: VETOGROUT CG519
vetonit-vetogrout-cg519.description: Ultra-high-strength non-shrink cementitious grout (>85 MPa). For heavy-duty machinery bedding, structural anchoring, and demanding grouting applications.

vetonit-betocem-80.name: BETOCEM 80 / VETOTOP CS536
vetonit-betocem-80.description: Premixed 30-100 mm thick cementitious screed for floor leveling and renovation. For bonded and unbonded applications.

vetonit-vetotop-cl530.name: VETOTOP CL530
vetonit-vetotop-cl530.description: Premixed 2-10 mm thick cementitious self-leveller for final floor finishing. High flowability and smooth finish.

vetonit-vetotop-cs536.name: VETOTOP CS536
vetonit-vetotop-cs536.description: Premixed 30-100 mm thick cementitious screed for bonded and unbonded applications. Suitable for underfloor heating.

vetonit-vetotop-ec498.name: VETOTOP EC498
vetonit-vetotop-ec498.description: Solvent-free high-performance high-build epoxy floor topping. Two-component epoxy system for heavy industrial floors.

vetonit-vetobond-pb433.name: VETOBOND PB433
vetonit-vetobond-pb433.description: Polymer bonding admixture for cementitious repair mortars and screeds. Improves adhesion, flexibility, and water resistance.

vetonit-monneli-primer-ac.name: MONNELI PRIMER AC
vetonit-monneli-primer-ac.description: Acrylic water-based primer (Monneli brand — sibling distribution to Saveto). For consolidating absorbent surfaces before coating or smoothing compound application.

vetonit-vetoprime-ep490-491.name: VETOPRIME EP490 / EP491
vetonit-vetoprime-ep490-491.description: Two-component solvent-free epoxy primer. EP491 as film-forming primer; EP490 as penetrating primer for epoxy floor systems.

vetonit-vetoproof-cm745.name: VETOPROOF CM745 (VETOPROOF S)
vetonit-vetoproof-cm745.description: Two-component flexible polymer-modified cementitious waterproof coating with unique crack-bridging characteristics even after long-term water immersion. Potable-water-approved and withstands negative hydrostatic pressure.
vetonit-vetoproof-cm745.classification: EN 14891 CM O2 P crack-bridging cementitious membrane

vetonit-vetoproof-azl.name: VETOPROOF AZL
vetonit-vetoproof-azl.description: Single-component, cold liquid-applied waterproofing and protective coating based on hybrid polyurethane technology. Flexible, durable, UV-resistant. High solar reflectance (SRI) cool-roof white colour.
vetonit-vetoproof-azl.classification: 1K hybrid polyurethane liquid waterproofing (UV-stable cool roof)

vetonit-vetoproof-s-20kg.name: VETOPROOF CM745 (20 KG KIT)
vetonit-vetoproof-s-20kg.description: Compact 20 kg variant of Vetoproof CM745 crack-bridging cementitious waterproofing membrane. Same performance characteristics.
vetonit-vetoproof-s-20kg.classification: EN 14891 CM O2 P crack-bridging cementitious membrane

vetonit-vetoproof-nwp-mesh.name: VETOPROOF NWP MESH
vetonit-vetoproof-nwp-mesh.description: Non-woven polypropylene reinforcement mesh for waterproofing systems. Embedded between coats of cementitious or liquid membranes.
application_areas: Reinforcement for Vetoproof CM745 and AZL

vetonit-kretesil-colmef.name: KRETESIL (COLMEF)
vetonit-kretesil-colmef.description: Colmef-branded crystalline cementitious waterproofing system. Penetrating silicate-based formulation for positive and negative-side waterproofing.

vetonit-monneli-elastoseal-pu40.name: MONNELI ELASTOSEAL PU40
vetonit-monneli-elastoseal-pu40.description: One-component polyurethane elastomeric joint sealant, ±25% movement capability. For expansion joints and dynamic joint sealing.

vetonit-vetoflex-pu780.name: VETOFLEX PU780
vetonit-vetoflex-pu780.description: Single-component liquid-applied polyurethane waterproofing membrane with sealant capability. For joints in waterproofing systems.
